name: Corn Tomato Linquini
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the linguini according to package instructions until al dente.
2. In a large pan, heat the balsamic vinegar over medium heat.
3. Add the chopped garlic and sauté until fragrant.
4. Stir in the corn kernels, sun-dried tomatoes, and basil leaves.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Drain the cooked linguini and top with the sauce mixture.
7. Serve with baked garlic bread on whole-grain slices.
